title: ウォンテッド・ジャパーン！！

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hrm... Mngh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way to go shopping, I stumble across Taiki Shuttle hunched
over in the middle of the road!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Howdy, Trainer! Yep, don't ya worry—I got what I was looking
for...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The best possible shot of this manhole cover! Photography's all about
findin' the right angle.
choice_data_list: Oh, you were taking a picture.
Oh, you were taking a picture.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right! Manhole covers in Japan have such unique designs.
My family's gonna be tickled pink when I share 'em!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ See, yesterday my family said they wanted to see more of
the city where I live.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm on the hunt for some nice photo spots! But it's a lot of
work for one person...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So come help me look, Trainer!
choice_data_list: I actually need to do some shopping...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Aww, that's too bad. And after we bumped into each other and
everything...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Think ya could do your shopping another time? I'd really appreciate
it! Pretty please?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If we take lots of pictures, I'm sure my family will be happy too. Time
to find all the nice spots Japan has to offer! Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Taiki forging excitedly ahead, we set off in search of prime
photo spots.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap, snap!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Great! Japanese vending machines really are on a whole 'nother level.
I mean, juice is one thing, but you can even buy food!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oden, udon, ramen—the list goes on!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I've never seen one that has sushi! Even though it tops the list
of Japanese comfort foods.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I've just had bad luck? Lemme know if ya come across one,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Is that a photo sticker booth I see? A true staple of Japanese pop
culture!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: It's got me on the edge of my seat! Let's go in, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'll count down for us, okay? Three, two, o—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A sticker featuring an extreme close-up of Taiki attempting to take a
photo pops out of the slot.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Silly Trainer! You hid behind me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But this sure is cool! I'm gonna have to share this sticker with my
family too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪ We really lucked out finding a taiyaki stand.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer! Hold on tight to that taiyaki for me, 'kay? I'm gonna
snap a quick photo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... Ahh, it smells so good.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's still fresh off the grill! Just look at that nice, crunchy tail. Feels
like a shame not to eat it right away...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Urgh... B-but the photo comes first! I've got to be... strong...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Drool...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Urk! Sorry, Trainer—I'm gonna need ya to stand a little farther away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Taiki and I visited place after place without so much as
stopping for a break.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Good! This is it—honest-to-goodness Japanese wabi-sabi-wasabi!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If only there was a samurai around... Oh, yes! Let's go take a picture
of a samurai next!
choice_data_list: The sun's about to go down, you know.
The sun's about to go down, you know.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, when did it get so late? Guess we'd better call it a day and
hightail it home!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I got a bunch of great shots. I'm sure this'll be enough
to—ah!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Stooooop!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I forgot the most important shot! Come over here, Trainer! Please?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hurry and scooch a bit closer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Say cheese!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yes! I got a nice shot of the two of us!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I've been wanting to introduce ya to my family for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're really important to me. I know I can always count on ya to
support me no matter what.
choice_data_list: I'm happy you feel that way.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! Ehehe... I'm happy too! Really happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We got a lot of nice shots, but I think this one's my favorite.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thank ya so much for today, Trainer. Let's go lookin' for more nice
spots around Japan again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that day, an email from the United States arrives in my inbox
with the subject "U.S. Pop Culture!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Attached is a family photo featuring a young Taiki Shuttle enjoying a
barbecue...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Below it is a short message that reads, "Thanks for looking after our
daughter!"
